title: Viral illness
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Identifies severity-risk contexts and distinguishes uncomplicated common cold from other respiratory presentations.
assessment.rationale: Supports uncomplicated common-cold respiratory symptom context but not a broad viral diagnosis.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Common Cold
source.population: Adults and children with common cold; severity caveats for neonates, older people, and long-term conditions.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for common-cold telehealth documentation; only partial for the broader fever/URTI baseline workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Identifies severity-risk contexts and distinguishes uncomplicated common cold from other respiratory presentations.

assessment.text: Defines Dubai telehealth scope and emergency/controlled-medication exclusions.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Common Cold
source.population: Adults and children with common cold; severity caveats for neonates, older people, and long-term conditions.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for common-cold telehealth documentation; only partial for the broader fever/URTI baseline workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines Dubai telehealth scope and emergency/controlled-medication exclusions.

assessment.text: Lists respiratory, swallowing, neurologic, rash, and pediatric breathing concerns that require assessment or escalation.
assessment.rationale: Supports breathing, chest, neurologic, swallowing, rash, and dehydration concerns as prompts only.
